channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: You need to go around the building, there will be a parking area there, 12th May
item.description:
It’s blocking access to the bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28-30, Elmfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs be pruned- on street opposite 75 Carisbrooke avn, 12th May
item.description:
Tree needs be pruned- on street opposite 75 Carisbrooke avn callers stated it is causing obstruction, he is also a wheelchair user.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 63, Carisbrooke Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 101 Brondesbury Villas, 12th May
item.description:
A carpet has been dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Carpet dumped by property, 12th May
item.description:
Carpet dumped outside property

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Versailles Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Wrong paving, reinstatement needed, 12th May
item.description:
Pacing has not been replaced correctly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 196-198, High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overhanging, 12th May
item.description:
Resident has called to report a number of trees located outside of the property which are overhanging onto their property and causing a lot of mess. This has not been attended too for a number of years. Please can this be looked into.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Gilroy Way, Ramsden, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 12th May
item.description:
This rubbish has been here for a month or so and is being added to.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Empire Square, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 black sacks side of 68 Herbert road, 12th May
item.description:
2 black sacks side of 68 Herbert road Resident advised 2 black sacs have been left there with shoes on top.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Herbert Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unroad safe dumping, 12th May
item.description:
Eye sore that is clearly never going to be driven again no number plate and rotting away. Vehicles cant turn when trying to leave
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 522, Footscray Road, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Divan bedframes flytipped, 12th May
item.description:
Bedframes flytipped into the grass verge within the last few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ridge Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped fridge,fencing panel, Christmas tree, 12th May
item.description:
Reported to Council via clean streets back in Feb2026 but still not removed or resolved. Now additional items added to pile I.e. chair, beginning to block access to footpath for dwellings .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Reginald Square, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Cardboard Tube dumped outside house, 12th May
item.description:
Someone abandoned a Cardboard tube behind our bins a few weeks ago
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bramblebury Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bag dumped at bus stop has split open, 12th May
item.description:
Rubbish flying everywhere

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Plaistow Lane, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Caller tripped and hurt nose/ Lower belvedere DA17 6DF O/S school, 12th May
item.description:
Caller tripped and hurt nose/ Lower belvedere DA17 6DF O/S school Caller advised her nan tripped due to tarmac not being level with slope- they would like this investigated
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Station Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overcrowded lime bikes parked dangerously, 12th May
item.description:
Report overcrowded lime bikes parked dangerously and Blocked off the pavement. Outside Cafe Concerto on Haymarket .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haymarket, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree, 12th May
item.description:
This tree is a danger to elderly infirmed, disabled, visually impaired & wheelchair/pram/ buggy users, obstructed by the low hanging branches & forced to walk into the road. It is in need of urgent pollarding

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Daneswood Avenue, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 193 New Kent Road - PLEASE remove it! :), 12th May
item.description:
This is the third time I’ve reported this rubbish. It was supposedly removed on Sunday morning. And again this morning. See screen shots! Please get rid of it. Thanks you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 193, New Kent Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned, broken blue bin attracting rubbish dumping, 12th May
item.description:
Been here at least a week. Places that attract dumping will soon become much worse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61, Adys Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tv unit and place bag full of rubbish on pavement, 12th May
item.description:
Bag ripped and all over pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pembroke Close, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 12th May
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carlton Vale, London

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)
